channel.title: deepsurface — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by deepsurface (deepsurface).

item.title: CVE-2021-29221
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability was discovered in Erlang/OTP prior to version 23.2.3. By adding files to an existing installation's directory, a local attacker could hijack accounts of other users running Erlang programs or possibly coerce…
